title: nachoneko Resource Packs
description: A carefully designed cartoon cute style interface remaster resource pack for Minecraft 1.20+, fully covering the original version and many practical mods, making every moment of your game burst with cuteness!
body:
# nachoneko Resource Packs
**A carefully designed cartoon cute style interface remaster resource pack for Minecraft 1.20+, fully covering the original version and many practical mods, making every moment of your game burst with cuteness!**

![Backpack screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36b815570fb8a37a547b8b4b68d95125bdcce148.png)

![Inventory screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4394a445993df41eb0e5c0161cc5afe0da6e41a6.png)

## ● Based on game version
≥ Minecraft 1.20

## ● Covered mods
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom)
- [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements)
- [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica)
- [Overflowing Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map)

## ● Core Features
1. Complete Overhaul: All vanilla interface elements, including the main menu, containers, HUD, and more, have been redrawn in a soft, adorable cartoon style.
2. Mod Compatibility: Dedicated to blending the interfaces of your favorite utility mods into this cute aesthetic, eliminating visual inconsistencies.
3. Continuous Updates: Ongoing support for more mods based on game version updates and community feedback.
